### Java policy decision (ElizaAgentService — ActivityManager probe)
07-02 23:30:06.467 I/ElizaAgent( 5492): inference memory policy: ramClass=CONSTRAINED totalMem=2975MB availMem=1950MB lmkThreshold=216MB nCtx=4096 idleUnloadMs=120000
07-02 23:33:14.410 I/ElizaAgent(13453): inference memory policy: ramClass=CONSTRAINED totalMem=2975MB availMem=1792MB lmkThreshold=216MB nCtx=4096 idleUnloadMs=120000
07-02 23:39:36.007 I/ElizaAgent(28252): inference memory policy: ramClass=CONSTRAINED totalMem=2975MB availMem=1933MB lmkThreshold=216MB nCtx=4096 idleUnloadMs=120000

### TS policy decision + release (aosp-local-inference, from agent.log)

### In-process pressure release captured during soak-1 (agent.log, direct read 03:34 UTC)
# The bun agent has no onTrimMemory; /proc/meminfo MemAvailable is its pressure signal.
# lever (c), in-process leg, firing on the constrained profile under real ambient pressure:
 Info  [aosp-local-inference] released the local model under memory pressure: MemAvailable=233MB / MemTotal=2976MB (ramClass=constrained); next request reloads on demand (#11760)

### On-device generate succeeded with the Gemma KV fix (agent.log, soak-2)
 Info  [aosp-local-inference] fused libelizainference text backend ready (model=eliza-1-2b-32k.gguf, mtpDrafter=none)
 (aosp-llama-debug) bootstrap:fusedText:loaded {"model":"eliza-1-2b-32k.gguf","gpuLayers":0,"cacheTypeK":"q8_0","cacheTypeV":"f16","draftModelPath":null}
 Info  [eliza-api] Android local direct chat fast path done (latencyMs=3782, textChars=31)

### LMK kills of ai.elizaos.app across the entire soak logcat: 0
# (grep -cE "lowmemorykiller.*ai.elizaos.app|Kill 'ai.elizaos.app'.*reason" logcat-full.log => 0)
# App "died" entries in logcat are this session's own `am force-stop` + reinstall cycles
# and foreign (sibling-session) FORCE_STOPs — exit-info reason=10 USER REQUESTED, NOT reason=3 LOW_MEMORY.

### Second on-device pressure release captured LIVE during the idle window (idle-cap-2)
 Info  [aosp-local-inference] released the local model under memory pressure: MemAvailable=321MB / MemTotal=2976MB (ramClass=constrained); next request reloads on demand (#11760)
# Correlated in meminfo-timeline.tsv: bun agent VmRSS dropped 1390908 kB (1.36 GB, model loaded)
# -> 654504 kB (640 MB, model freed) as MemAvailable rose ~459 MB -> ~1030 MB. ~700 MB reclaimed
# WITHOUT the app being killed; a follow-up request reloaded the model (VmRSS back to ~1.5 GB).
